result.summary: 1 HTTP API surface: the Google Cloud On-Demand Scanning REST API at ondemandscanning.googleapis.com, authenticated with Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens/service-account credentials.
result.description: Google Cloud On-Demand Scanning is a vulnerability scanning service for container images and packages within Artifact Analysis. It lets users trigger manual scans and retrieve scan results for supported artifacts.

gcp_oauth.label: Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 access token or service-account credentials
gcp_oauth.setup: Enable the On-Demand Scanning API for your Google Cloud project in the [Google Cloud console](https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/library/ondemandscanning.googleapis.com). Then authenticate with Google Cloud credentials, typically by running `gcloud auth application-default login` for user credentials or creating a service account in the [Google Cloud console](https://console.cloud.google.com/iam-admin/serviceaccounts) and using its JSON key / workload identity. Client libraries and `gcloud` then mint OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens for the API.
